# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent service mesh security.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: low-latency-services
  labels:
    istio-injection: disabled
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: direct-access-services
  annotations:
    description: "Namespace for services requiring direct network access without Istio sidecar proxy overhead"

---

apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: direct-access-sa
  namespace: low-latency-services
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: platform-team
automountServiceAccountToken: false

---

apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: direct-access-network-policy
  namespace: low-latency-services
  annotations:
    description: "Restrict network access for services bypassing the mesh - compensating security control"
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      mesh-bypass: "true"
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: low-latency-services
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              mesh-bypass: "true"
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8080
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8443
  egress:
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: low-latency-services
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8080
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8443
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: kube-system
      ports:
        - protocol: UDP
          port: 53
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 53

---

# Low-latency data ingestion service - bypasses sidecar for minimal latency
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: data-ingestion-service
  namespace: low-latency-services
  labels:
    app: data-ingestion-service
    version: v1
    mesh-bypass: "true"
    app.kubernetes.io/name: data-ingestion-service
    app.kubernetes.io/component: ingestion
spec:
  replicas: 3
  revisionHistoryLimit: 5
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: data-ingestion-service
      mesh-bypass: "true"
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: data-ingestion-service
        version: v1
        mesh-bypass: "true"
      annotations:
        # Disable Istio sidecar injection for low-latency direct network access
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
        prometheus.io/scrape: "true"
        prometheus.io/port: "9090"
        prometheus.io/path: "/metrics"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: direct-access-sa
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 10001
        runAsGroup: 10001
        fsGroup: 10001
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: data-ingestion
          image: registry.example.com/data-ingestion-service:1.0.0
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8080
              protocol: TCP
            - name: https
              containerPort: 8443
              protocol: TCP
            - name: metrics
              containerPort: 9090
              protocol: TCP
          env:
            - name: SERVICE_PORT
              value: "8080"
            - name: TLS_ENABLED
              value: "true"
            - name: TLS_CERT_PATH
              value: "/etc/tls/tls.crt"
            - name: TLS_KEY_PATH
              value: "/etc/tls/tls.key"
            - name: MTLS_ENABLED
              value: "true"
            - name: MTLS_CA_PATH
              value: "/etc/tls/ca.crt"
            - name: LOG_LEVEL
              value: "info"
            - name: LOG_FORMAT
              value: "json"
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            runAsNonRoot: true
            runAsUser: 10001
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 250m
              memory: 256Mi
            limits:
              cpu: "1"
              memory: 512Mi
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz/ready
              port: 8080
              scheme: HTTP
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 3
            failureThreshold: 3
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz/live
              port: 8080
              scheme: HTTP
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
            timeoutSeconds: 3
            failureThreshold: 3
          startupProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz/startup
              port: 8080
              scheme: HTTP
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 12
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tls-certs
              mountPath: /etc/tls
              readOnly: true
            - name: tmp
              mountPath: /tmp
      volumes:
        - name: tls-certs
          secret:
            secretName: data-ingestion-tls
            defaultMode: 0400
        - name: tmp
          emptyDir:
            medium: Memory
            sizeLimit: 64Mi
      topologySpreadConstraints:
        - maxSkew: 1
          topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
          whenUnsatisfiable: DoNotSchedule
          labelSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: data-ingestion-service

---

# Real-time streaming processor - bypasses sidecar for minimal latency
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: stream-processor-service
  namespace: low-latency-services
  labels:
    app: stream-processor-service
    version: v1
    mesh-bypass: "true"
    app.kubernetes.io/name: stream-processor-service
    app.kubernetes.io/component: streaming
spec:
  replicas: 2
  revisionHistoryLimit: 5
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: stream-processor-service
      mesh-bypass: "true"
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: stream-processor-service
        version: v1
        mesh-bypass: "true"
      annotations:
        # Disable Istio sidecar injection for low-latency direct network access
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
        prometheus.io/scrape: "true"
        prometheus.io/port: "9090"
        prometheus.io/path: "/metrics"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: direct-access-sa
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 45
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 10002
        runAsGroup: 10002
        fsGroup: 10002
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: stream-processor
          image: registry.example.com/stream-processor-service:1.0.0
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8080
              protocol: TCP
            - name: https
              containerPort: 8443
              protocol: TCP
            - name: metrics
              containerPort: 9090
              protocol: TCP
          env:
            - name: SERVICE_PORT
              value: "8080"
            - name: TLS_ENABLED
              value: "true"
            - name: TLS_CERT_PATH
              value: "/etc/tls/tls.crt"
            - name: TLS_KEY_PATH
              value: "/etc/tls/tls.key"
            - name: MTLS_ENABLED
              value: "true"
            - name: MTLS_CA_PATH
              value: "/etc/tls/ca.crt"
            - name: STREAM_BUFFER_SIZE
              value: "65536"
            - name: LOG_LEVEL
              value: "info"
            - name: LOG_FORMAT
              value: "json"
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            runAsNonRoot: true
            runAsUser: 10002
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 512Mi
            limits:
              cpu: "2"
              memory: 1Gi
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz/ready
              port: 8080
              scheme: HTTP
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 3
            failureThreshold: 3
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz/live
              port: 8080
              scheme: HTTP
            initialDelaySeconds: 20
            periodSeconds: 20
            timeoutSeconds: 3
            failureThreshold: 3
          startupProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz/startup
              port: 8080
              scheme: HTTP
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 15
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tls-certs
              mountPath: /etc/tls
              readOnly: true
            - name: tmp
              mountPath: /tmp
      volumes:
        - name: tls-certs
          secret:
            secretName: stream-processor-tls
            defaultMode: 0400
        - name: tmp
          emptyDir:
            medium: Memory
            sizeLimit: 128Mi
      topologySpreadConstraints:
        - maxSkew: 1
          topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
          whenUnsatisfiable: DoNotSchedule
          labelSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: stream-processor-service

---

# High-frequency metrics collector - bypasses sidecar for minimal latency
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: metrics-collector-service
  namespace: low-latency-services
  labels:
    app: metrics-collector-service
    version: v1
    mesh-bypass: "true"
    app.kubernetes.io/name: metrics-collector-service
    app.kubernetes.io/component: observability
spec:
  replicas: 2
  revisionHistoryLimit: 5
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: metrics-collector-service
      mesh-bypass: "true"
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: metrics-collector-service
        version: v1
        mesh-bypass: "true"
      annotations:
        # Disable Istio sidecar injection for low-latency direct network access
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
        prometheus.io/scrape: "true"
        prometheus.io/port: "9090"
        prometheus.io/path: "/metrics"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: direct-access-sa
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 10003
        runAsGroup: 10003
        fsGroup: 10003
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: metrics-collector
          image: registry.example.com/metrics-collector-service:1.0.0
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8080
              protocol: TCP
            - name: https
              containerPort: 8443
              protocol: TCP
            - name: metrics
              containerPort: 9090
              protocol: TCP
          env:
            - name: SERVICE_PORT
              value: "8080"
            - name: TLS_ENABLED
              value: "true"
            - name: TLS_CERT_PATH
              value: "/etc/tls/tls.crt"
            - name: TLS_KEY_PATH
              value: "/etc/tls/tls.key"
            - name: MTLS_ENABLED
              value: "true"
            - name: MTLS_CA_PATH
              value: "/etc/tls/ca.crt"
            - name: COLLECTION_INTERVAL_MS
              value: "100"
            - name: LOG_LEVEL
              value: "info"
            - name: LOG_FORMAT
              value: "json"
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            runAsNonRoot: true
            runAsUser: 10003
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 200m
              memory: 256Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 512Mi
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz/ready
              port: 8080
              scheme: HTTP
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 3
            failureThreshold: 3
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz/live
              port: 8080
              scheme: HTTP
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
            timeoutSeconds: 3
            failureThreshold: 3
          startupProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz/startup
              port: 8080
              scheme: HTTP
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 10
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tls-certs
              mountPath: /etc/tls
              readOnly: true
            - name: tmp
              mountPath: /tmp
      volumes:
        - name: tls-certs
          secret:
            secretName: metrics-collector-tls
            defaultMode: 0400
        - name: tmp
          emptyDir:
            medium: Memory
            sizeLimit: 64Mi
      topologySpreadConstraints:
        - maxSkew: 1
          topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
          whenUnsatisfiable: DoNotSchedule
          labelSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: metrics-collector-service

---

# Services for direct-access deployments
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: data-ingestion-service
  namespace: low-latency-services
  labels:
    app: data-ingestion-service
    mesh-bypass: "true"
spec:
  selector:
    app: data-ingestion-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
      protocol: TCP
    - name: https
      port: 8443
      targetPort: 8443
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP

---

apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: stream-processor-service
  namespace: low-latency-services
  labels:
    app: stream-processor-service
    mesh-bypass: "true"
spec:
  selector:
    app: stream-processor-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
      protocol: TCP
    - name: https
      port: 8443
      targetPort: 8443
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP

---

apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: metrics-collector-service
  namespace: low-latency-services
  labels:
    app: metrics-collector-service
    mesh-bypass: "true"
spec:
  selector:
    app: metrics-collector-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
      protocol: TCP
    - name: https
      port: 8443
      targetPort: 8443
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP

---

# PodDisruptionBudget for data-ingestion-service
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: data-ingestion-service-pdb
  namespace: low-latency-services
  labels:
    app: data-ingestion-service
spec:
  minAvailable: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: data-ingestion-service

---

# PodDisruptionBudget for stream-processor-service
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: stream-processor-service-pdb
  namespace: low-latency-services
  labels:
    app: stream-processor-service
spec:
  minAvailable: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: stream-processor-service

---

# PodDisruptionBudget for metrics-collector-service
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: metrics-collector-service-pdb
  namespace: low-latency-services
  labels:
    app: metrics-collector-service
spec:
  minAvailable: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: metrics-collector-service

---

# Istio PeerAuthentication to set PERMISSIVE mode for the namespace
# so non-sidecar pods can still communicate with mesh services if needed
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: low-latency-permissive
  namespace: low-latency-services
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: PERMISSIVE
